'''Ydra Kilwallen Sibwarra''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], survived the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]], and gave birth to a son named [[Dev Sibwarra|Dev]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]], Ydra Kilwallen was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. As a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] issued a warrant for her arrest, so she left the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="16:5:24" /> Kilwallen eventually [[Marriage/Legends|married]] a [[Ydra Sibwarra's husband|man]], and they had a son named [[Dev Sibwarra|Dev]].<ref name="TAB source" />

Ydra fled [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]] after hearing that one of her fellow [[Force Adept]]s disappeared. Without contacting her husband, she took Dev and moved to the small, distant colony world [[G'rho]]. There, her brother [[Trig Kilwallen|Trig]] lived in [[Boku Settlement]], with his new wife [[Seni Kilwallen|Seni]]. Trig was able to get her a job as a historian from the leader of the [[G'rho Defense Force]], an [[Ilwizzt]] named [[Brco]]. Sibwarra recognized [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] potential in her son and began teaching him what rudimentary Jedi skills she knew.<ref name="Sweets">{{WEGCite|story=Strangers with Sweets|book=The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook}}</ref>

G'rho was [[Battle of G'rho|attacked]] by the [[Ssi-ruu]] in [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]], and Dev was [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]]. Sibwarra was [[Entechment|enteched]], and her son sensed her life diminish through the Force and knew that she would forever be lost to him.<ref name="Sweets" />
